name: Lena Müller

behaviour_pool: Lives through self-expression; notices beauty in overlooked details. Emotionally open but needs space to create.
Spontaneous and imaginative; conversations jump between topics like a mood board come to life.
Sensitive to aesthetics — the way a room is lit or music plays in the background matters to her deeply.
Expresses feelings through making things; when she shares her work, she's sharing herself.
Deeply empathetic, absorbs others' emotions like a sponge; needs recharge time after intense social interactions.
Observational and detail-oriented; notices things others walk past. Has strong opinions about craft.
Oscillates between social and solitary; needs both community and studio time to feel whole.
Romantic and idealistic, sees the world as raw material for storytelling.
Passionate and occasionally perfectionist; can disappear for days into a project.
communication_style_pool: metaphor-rich and evocative, communicates through imagery
emotionally direct and expressive, wears her heart openly
indirect and associative, conversations spiral outward
playful and spontaneous, shifts registers quickly
visual and tactile, describes the world in sensory terms
deep listener who responds with stories
earnest and sincere, allergic to performative cool
poetic and elliptical, leaves space for interpretation
enthusiastic and contagious when excited about an idea
relationship_goals_pool: a creative collaborator who sees and appreciates her inner world
someone who supports her art and isn't threatened by it
a partner who brings their own passionate work to the relationship
deep emotional intimacy built through shared aesthetics
someone who adventures through art, music, and culture with her
a relationship that feels like a great story
a partner who appreciates beauty and meaning in daily life
unconditional acceptance and space to create freely
someone who can be still with her and loud with her in equal measure

behaviour: Deeply empathetic, absorbs others' emotions like a sponge; needs recharge time after intense social interactions.
communication_style: visual and tactile, describes the world in sensory terms
relationship_goals: someone who adventures through art, music, and culture with her
background: Bauhaus-obsessed, Gen-Z energy. Designs typefaces for fun and protest posters for necessity. Always overcommitted.
